tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
edit "LAN_NET"
set subnet 192.168.1.0 255.255.255.0
next
edit "PUBLIC_DNS_1"
set subnet 1.1.1.1 255.255.255.255
next
edit "PUBLIC_DNS_2"
set subnet 8.8.8.8 255.255.255.255
next
edit "ATTACKER_C2"
set subnet 203.0.113.1 255.255.255.255
next
end
config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "EGRESS_ALLOW_LAN_DNS"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set action accept
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "LAN_NET" "PUBLIC_DNS_1" "PUBLIC_DNS_2"
set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
set logtraffic all
next
edit 0
set name "EGRESS_BLOCK_C2"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set action deny
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "ATTACKER_C2"
set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
set logtraffic all
next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall address

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) # edit "LAN_NET"
new entry 'LAN_NET' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (LAN_NET) # set subnet 192.168.1.0 255.255.255.0

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (LAN_NET) # next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) # edit "PUBLIC_DNS_1"
new entry 'PUBLIC_DNS_1' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (PUBLIC_DNS_1) # set subnet 1.1.1.1 255.255.255.255

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (PUBLIC_DNS_1) # next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) # edit "PUBLIC_DNS_2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) # edit "ATTACKER_C2"
new entry 'ATTACKER_C2' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (ATTACKER_C2) # set subnet 203.0.113.1 255.255.255.255

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (ATTACKER_C2) # next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # edit 0
new entry '0' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) # set name "EGRESS_ALLOW_LAN_DNS"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) # set srcintf "port2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) # set dstintf "port1"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) # set action accept

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) # set srcaddr "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) # set dstaddr "LAN_NET" "PUBLIC_DNS_1" "PUBLIC_DNS_2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) # set schedule "always"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) # set service "ALL"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) # set logtraffic all

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) # next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # edit 0
new entry '0' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) # set name "EGRESS_BLOCK_C2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) # set srcintf "port2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) # set dstintf "port1"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) # set action deny

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) # set srcaddr "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) # set dstaddr "ATTACKER_C2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) # set schedule "always"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) # set service "ALL"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) # set logtraffic all

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) # next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
